---
title: "17.9 Exercises Problem 2"
author: "Camilla Rosour"
format: html
---

## Readings 10

# Problem 1:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(pdxTrees)
library(sf)
library(RColorBrewer)
```

```{r}
data <- pdxTrees::get_pdxTrees_parks() |>
  st_as_sf(coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"))
```


```{r}
pal_factor <- colorFactor(palette = "YlOrRd", 
                    domain = data$Species,
                    reverse = TRUE)

leaflet() |>
  addProviderTiles("OpenStreetMap") |>
  addCircleMarkers(data = data,
                   fillColor = ~pal_factor(data$Species),
                   radius = 3,
                   stroke = FALSE,
                   fillOpacity = 3)
```
